lesson.subtitle: Lesson 2 -- Blast Off!
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Bento | Lesson 2 -- Blast Off!

listenings.text: Look at the sky! It is night. I can see the moon. I can see one, two, three stars! Now the rocket is ready. Let's count! Ten, nine, eight, seven, six, five, four, three, two, one. Blast off! The rocket goes up, up, up!
The rocket is in space now. Wow! I can see a big planet. The planet is red. I can see the moon too. The moon is small. One rocket, two planets, many stars! Space is beautiful.
